meta.source_note: Updated based on the latest CV data and local certificate files.

title: Campus Hall
description: Area untuk menampilkan latar pendidikan formal, program pembelajaran, dan pengembangan akademik.

items.description: Undergraduate Informatics study at UIN Sunan Kalijaga Yogyakarta with academic focus on software engineering, database design, artificial intelligence, and user-centered system development.
highlights: Built a foundation in operating systems, computer security, artificial intelligence, algorithm theory, programming, and database design.
Completed academic software projects involving software development, database modeling, and human-computer interaction.

Developed a web-based thesis project for MySQL DDL optimization using Gemini API, featuring structured schema analysis, AI-generated recommendations, suggestion review, SQL diff preview, Docker Sandbox validation, AI self-correction, and downloadable optimized SQL output.

items.institution: Coding Camp powered by DBS Foundation
items.description: A full-stack web development learning program covering front-end, back-end, RESTful API development, deployment workflow, and capstone project implementation.
highlights: Completed a full-stack web development learning path covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Git/GitHub, Node.js, RESTful APIs, and Web APIs.
Built responsive front-end applications using browser storage, asynchronous JavaScript, accessibility principles, PWA concepts, and deployment workflows.
Developed back-end applications in the form of RESTful APIs and completed a capstone project applying integrated front-end/back-end development practices.

items.description: A mobile development learning program focused on Kotlin, Android application development, AI fundamentals, applied machine learning, and final/capstone project development.
focus: Applied Machine Learning for Android Developer
highlights: Completed the Mobile Development path covering Basic Kotlin, Beginner Android, Android Fundamental, Intermediate Android, AI, and Applied Machine Learning for Android Developer.

Built Android applications using Kotlin and Android Studio with Android components, UI, localization, background processing, media, sensors, location, database, testing, Firebase, and Jetpack Compose.
Completed a capstone/final project while strengthening product development, portfolio readiness, and career development skills.
